purpose: Final whole-project profile coverage repair tightens startup routing evidence to the focused startup store endpoint.

set.targetBehavior: `profile_route_service.cj::buildLogoutTransition` now owns the translated profile-route teardown state, while `startup_store.cj::resolveStartRoute(false)` preserves the post-logout entry behavior that returns the app to onboarding.
verificationEvidence: Manual source review confirmed `ProfileViewModel.kt` contains no initialization or resume logic beyond logout handling.

Manual target review confirmed `profile_route_service.cj::buildLogoutTransition` captures the translated route teardown state and `startup_store.cj::resolveStartRoute(false)` returns the onboarding route.

Final-coverage test build report PASS: `translation-inputs/test-build-reports/final-coverage/test-build-report.md` ran `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` from `entry/src/test/cangjie` successfully.

testEvidence.detail: `phase06_profile_capabilities_verification_test.cj::profileStorePreservesBackAndLogoutRoutes`, `::profileLogoutTransitionResetsRouteStateAndReturnsOnboarding`, and `::startupResolverReturnsOnboardingAfterLogoutStyleState` verify the translated logout teardown and post-logout entry routing.
Final-coverage test build report PASS: `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` succeeded from `entry/src/test/cangjie`.

manualEvidence.detail: The translated logout teardown clears route-local state through the focused profile route service and returns the app to the onboarding entry path.

set.targetBehavior: `profile_store.cj::logout` preserves the translated persisted-session mutation, `profile_route_service.cj::buildLogoutTransition` captures the immediate local route-state reset, and `startup_store.cj::resolveStartRoute(false)` preserves the resulting onboarding entry state after logout.
verificationEvidence: Manual source review confirmed `ProfileViewModel.kt` performs a single logout state mutation followed by the supplied callback.

Manual target review confirmed `profile_store.cj::logout`, `profile_route_service.cj::buildLogoutTransition`, and `startup_store.cj::resolveStartRoute` now separate the translated mutation, local reset, and startup-resolution responsibilities.

Final-coverage test build report PASS: `translation-inputs/test-build-reports/final-coverage/test-build-report.md` ran `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` from `entry/src/test/cangjie` successfully.

testEvidence.detail: `phase06_profile_capabilities_verification_test.cj::profileStorePreservesBackAndLogoutRoutes`, `::profileLogoutTransitionResetsRouteStateAndReturnsOnboarding`, and `::startupResolverReturnsOnboardingAfterLogoutStyleState` verify the translated logout mutation propagates immediately to local route reset and the next startup route.
Final-coverage test build report PASS: `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` succeeded from `entry/src/test/cangjie`.

manualEvidence.detail: The translated logout flow keeps the same immediate state propagation pattern as the source profile ViewModel callback path through focused profile endpoints instead of a broad shell handler.

set.targetBehavior: The target replaces this shallow source-side smoke test with focused Cangjie verification for profile back/logout routing, explicit profile action-section messaging, and startup-route resolution in `phase06_profile_capabilities_verification_test.cj`, backed by a passing final-coverage test gate and precise profile route service/startup store endpoints.
